item.title: Introducing Visual Edits
item.description: Gain a Figma-like editing experience in Lovable, allowing instant tweaks to sizes, colors, and elements without prompting the AI.

item.title: Introducing Versioning 2.0 to Lovable
item.description: Restore to earlier versions of your app more easily by using bookmarks and our improved history view.

item.title: Versioning, Dev Mode & Lovable Livestream with Clerk
item.description: Versioning, Dev Mode & Lovable Livestream with Clerk

item.title: Introducing Agent Mode (Beta): enabling Lovable to think, plan, and take actions autonomously
item.description: Introducing Agent Mode (Beta): enabling Lovable to think, plan, and take actions autonomously

item.title: Lovable Raises $200M, Valued at $1.8B, Just Eight Months After Launch
item.description: Lovable Raises $200M, Valued at $1.8B, Just Eight Months After Launch

item.title: $100M ARR & Lovable Agent
item.description: $100M ARR & Lovable Agent

item.title: Lovable Goes Back to School
item.description: Lovable Goes Back to School

item.title: Introducing Lovable File Uploads
item.description: Drop files directly into Lovable and turn them into apps and websites.

item.title: Introducing Lovable Cloud and AI
item.description: Lovable Cloud is a built-in backend for Lovable apps. With it you can build apps that save your data, let users sign up and log in, and connect safely with other services just by telling Lovable what you want done. No external dashboards or configuration screens. Everything just works, right within your Lovable project.

item.title: AI usage in Lovable apps through Lovable AI is FREE (with Google Gemini models) until October 6th!
item.description: AI usage in Lovable apps through Lovable AI is FREE (with Google Gemini models) until October 6th!

item.title: Shopify Integration with Lovable: What You Need to Know
item.description: Learn how to integrate Shopify with no-code and AI tools to build smarter ecommerce apps.

item.title: Build apps from a link with Lovable Build with URL
item.description: Build apps from a link with Lovable Build with URL

item.title: One year of Lovable: Welcome to the age of the builder
item.description: One year of Lovable: Welcome to the age of the builder

item.title: Lovable acquires Molnett and expands our platform team
item.description: Lovable acquires Molnett and expands our platform team

item.title: Lovable Now Supports Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: Lovable Now Supports Claude Opus 4.5

item.title: Better planning, better apps: Chat mode & Follow-up questions
item.description: Better planning, better apps: Chat mode & Follow-up questions

item.title: Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Firecrawl, and Miro: now in Lovable
item.description: Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Firecrawl, and Miro: now in Lovable

item.title: Lovable raises $330M to power the age of the builder
item.description: Lovable raises $330M to power the age of the builder

item.title: Build more. Manage less.
item.description: Lovable now handles more complex builds more autonomously with less back-and-forth. Hand off ambitious ideas, queue up your thinking, and ship with confidence.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.6 now in Lovable
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 now in Lovable

item.title: Go beyond building apps with Lovable
item.description: You can now analyze data, create and edit files, generate business docs, and turn things like spreadsheets into working apps without ever leaving Lovable.

item.title: Lovable partners with Aikido to offer affordable pentesting for builders
item.description: Introduced Penetration Testing for all Lovable projects.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 now in Lovable
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 now in Lovable

item.title: Wiz findings now in Lovable
item.description: Wiz security scanning is now native to Lovable — findings surface in every project

item.title: Turn repeated instructions into reusable skills in Lovable
item.description: Learn how skills in Lovable let you save reusable instructions as markdown files, so you stop repeating yourself every time you build.

item.title: Connect Lovable to Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise to build apps and more on data you already have
item.description: Connect Lovable to Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise to build apps and more on data you already have

item.title: Introducing subagents: Lovable is now better at multitasking
item.description: Lovable can now create subagents to help it research, explore, and search your project in parallel.

item.title: How Lovable protects your apps automatically
item.description: Learn about our new scan profiles, security memory, and security scanning scheduling.

item.title: Introducing Workspace Insights: See every project, govern with confidence
item.description: Workspace Insights brings every Enterprise project into one view in Security Center — see what

item.title: Your Lovable app now works inside ChatGPT and Claude
item.description: Starting today, you can make your Lovable app available inside AI tools — your users can use it directly in ChatGPT, Claude, or their AI tool of choice.
